items.title: Paging Dr. Chatbot
items.description: We look at when you can trust A.I. with your health, and when you can’t.

items.title: I Left My Job at OpenAI. Putting Ads on ChatGPT Was the Last Straw.
items.description: Ads on ChatGPT aren’t a bad idea. But they have to be done the right way.

items.title: Thanks Olympics. We Needed This.
items.description: The Olympics have brought a much needed injection of awe, a welcome breather from a barrage of disturbing news.

items.title: A Deadly Mass Shooting in Canada, and the Latest on the Search for Nancy Guthrie
items.description: Plus, how extremist groups are using video games to recruit children online.

items.title: Trump to Meet Netanyahu in Washington Amid Tensions With Iran
items.description: It will be the sixth visit by Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu of Israel to the United States to meet with President Trump since the president began ...
